title: 21:10 ГўВҖВ” March 23, 2021
body_text:
21:10 ГўВҖВ” March 23, 2021
Update to Central 1ГўВҖВҷs File Specifications Part
We added XML file specifications for qualified debit clearing items to Central 1ГўВҖВҷs File Specifications Part. The new file specification documents are available on the secure site. Please see the tables below for details.
